description_long: This is a rustic wooden chair with a high backrest and sturdy construction, featuring a weathered brown leather seat and back cushion. The chair's frame is made of natural wood with visible grain and some signs of wear, giving it a vintage or handcrafted appearance. Four prominent gold-colored decorative knobs are mounted on the tops of the armrests and backrest posts, adding a touch of ornate detail. The back of the chair is adorned with a black graphic of a bearded face and the text 'UNDER THE HILL PRODUCTS,' suggesting a custom or branded design. The seat and back cushions show signs of aging and use, with patches of discoloration and texture variation. The overall design suggests durability and comfort, suitable for both decorative and functional use in urban outdoor or semi-outdoor settings.
description: A rustic wooden chair with weathered brown leather cushions, gold decorative knobs, and a branded graphic on the backrest. The chair exudes a vintage, handcrafted look with sturdy armrests and a high back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the worn brown leather seat and back cushion, wooden frame, and gold knobs on the armrests and backrest posts.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chair's thick wooden frame, angled backrest, and the profile of the seat cushion.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wood grain, gold knobs, and a black graphic with text on the backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same wooden frame and gold knob details as the other side.
